input_summary: Finance and operations teams at a 200-person professional services firm are struggling with a manual expense approval process. Employees submit paper forms or Excel spreadsheets to their line managers, who then email them to Finance. The process takes 3–6 weeks to reimburse, causing employee dissatisfaction. Finance spends 40 hours/month on manual reconciliation. The CFO has mandated a digital expense management solution to be live within Q3.

people_and_roles.source_text: Employees submit paper forms or Excel spreadsheets
submit paper forms or Excel spreadsheets to their line managers
Finance spends 40 hours/month on manual reconciliation
The CFO has mandated a digital expense management solution

business_objectives.value: Reduce reimbursement cycle from 3–6 weeks to under 1 week

business_objectives.value: Reduce Finance manual reconciliation effort by at least 50%
